title: Coffin Texts, Spell 335: I Am Atum
description: The democratization of the afterlife — any person, not just the pharaoh, can become one with the creator god.
introduction: The democratization of the afterlife — any person, not just the pharaoh, can become one with the creator god.

translation.text: I am Atum who came into being from the primordial waters. I am the great god who came into being by himself.
